title: I want to filter my monday board data with the exact match not using contains_text filter, is there a way to do this?
excerpt: This is the query where i want to filter the data which exactly matches the compare_value, but operator: contains_text will pick all the containing records, is there any way to do this, please see the query for reference…

posts.author: qadeerdev (Qadeer)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is the query where i want to filter the data which exactly matches the compare_value, but operator: contains_text will pick all the containing records, is there any way to do this, please see the query for reference.

{
“query”: “query { boards (ids: [some_board_id]) { items_page (limit: 1, query_params: {rules: [{column_id: “some_id”, compare_value: [“some_value”], operator: contains_text}]}) { cursor items { id name group { id title } column_values { id type text value … on StatusValue { index text type label value label_style { border color } } } } } } }”
}
